title: zornia acuta
intro: Zornia acuta, also known as sharpseed or pointed zornia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, Zornia acuta has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, Zornia acuta is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also applied topically to the skin as a paste or ointment.
